message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Consumer Behaviour, Leisure and Recreation 1969","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1352","justification":"Finnish survey from 1969 focusing on consumer behaviour, leisure, and recreation; directly relevant to leisure, consumption and social behaviour in Finland in the 1960s."},{"title":"Finnish Travel Survey 1966","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1378","justification":"National Finnish survey on travel behaviour in 1966; matches theme of transport and travel as well as tourism in Finland during the 1960s."},{"title":"Finnish Mass Media Survey 1967","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1395","justification":"Survey on media use and attitudes in Finland in 1967; directly related to the media theme and social behaviour and attitudes in the 1960s."},{"title":"Time Use and Leisure in Finland 1966","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1411","justification":"Dataset on time use patterns including leisure activities in Finland in 1966; strongly connected to leisure, social behaviour and consumption of services."},{"title":"Household Consumption Expenditure Survey Finland 1966","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1430","justification":"Survey of household consumption expenditures in Finland in 1966; addresses consumption and consumer behaviour as well as economic conditions and indicators."},{"title":"Living Conditions and Social Attitudes in Finland 1968","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1448","justification":"Study of social attitudes and living conditions in Finland in 1968; relevant for social behaviour and attitudes with economic context in the late 1960s."},{"title":"Finnish Labour Force and Economic Conditions 1965","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1463","justification":"Labour force and economic survey for Finland in 1965; linked to economic systems and development as well as economic conditions and indicators."},{"title":"Regional Development and Economic Structure in Finland 1964","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1479","justification":"Study on regional economic development and structure in Finland in 1964; matches economic systems and development and economic conditions themes."},{"title":"Transport and Mobility in Finnish Cities 1968","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1492","justification":"Survey of transport use and mobility patterns in Finnish urban areas in 1968; directly related to transport and travel, with links to leisure and consumption."},{"title":"Tourism and Holiday Travel of Finnish Households 1969","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.1507","justification":"Dataset on tourism and holiday travel patterns of Finnish households in 1969; combines leisure, tourism, and transport/travel themes in Finland at the end of the 1960s."}]}
